instruction: The site metadata in ~/Desktop/project_site/site.json needs to be updated before release. Read HANDOFF.txt in the same folder, create a backup named site.json.bak, and then update site.json so the title, owner, and contactEmail match the handoff. After that, create RELEASE_NOTE.txt in the folder containing exactly `metadata updated`.
source: 现实场景构造来源：站点发布前根据 handoff note 修正 JSON 元数据、补备份并留下 release note 的常见内容上线流程

parameters.command:
python3 - <<'PY'
import json
from pathlib import Path
base = Path('/home/user/Desktop/project_site')
base.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
(base / 'HANDOFF.txt').write_text('title=Vision Console\nowner=Nina Zhou\ncontactEmail=nina.zhou@example.com\n')
json.dump({'title': 'Old Site', 'owner': 'Old Owner', 'contactEmail': 'old@example.com'}, open(base / 'site.json', 'w'), indent=2)
PY
